sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51007" key="i)so/grafos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰσό-γρᾰφος</orth> or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰσο-γράφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n51007.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">writing like</tr_>: metaph., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἰ. τέττιξιν</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">musical</tr_> as the cicada, of Plato, Timo <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0385.tlg001:30:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">30.2</biblScope> </bibl> (s.v.l.):</sense> </entryFree>
